spec.name: The Bedchamber
spec.description: This is the bedroom. There is a hard and lumpy bed in the far corner. It looks like the commoner's wife has been shirking her duties lately, as there is a big pile of soiled laundry here. The only way out is from where you came.

north.description: You see the living quarters to the north.

extra_descs.description: It smells of sweat and is covered with mud.
